Maryam Khalil is a Java Developer with contact information including email, phone number, GitHub, LinkedIn, and a personal website.

Maryam Khalil received a Bachelor of Engineering in Computer Science and Engineering from RTMNU University - Jhulelal Institute of Technology in Nagpur, India, from January 2013 to January 2017. She also completed her HSC and SSC from Maharashtra State Board in Nagpur, India, from January 2011 to January 2013 and January 2010 to January 2011 respectively.

Maryam Khalil has been working as a Java Developer at Inouvelle Egypt Solutions in Cairo, Egypt since December 2017. She develops and maintains enterprise-level applications using Java, J2EE, Spring, and Hibernate, and contributes to full-stack development with Angular.
Maryam Khalil developed a Stock Management System for the medicinal market using Angular, JAVA - J2EE, Spring, Hibernate Framework, and PostgreSQL Database from December 2017 to Present.
Maryam Khalil designed and implemented a Printing Press Management System using Angular, JAVA - J2EE, Spring, Hibernate Framework, and PostgreSQL Database from December 2017 to Present.
Maryam Khalil has 17 months of experience in J2EE, 6 months in C++, Databases (MySQL, PostgreSQL), Functional Testing, and Linux, all acquired through projects.

Maryam Khalil's skills include programming languages C, C++, Java, and Angular, frameworks & libraries J2EE, Spring, Hibernate, databases MySQL and PostgreSQL, testing Functional Testing and Manual Testing, and operating systems Windows and Linux.

Maryam Khalil is a dedicated Java Developer based in Cairo, Egypt, with Inouvelle Egypt Solutions since December 2017. She’s a builder of robust, enterprise-level applications, fluent in the languages of Java, J2EE, Spring, and Hibernate, and increasingly adept at crafting compelling front-ends with Angular. Her work isn’t merely coding; she’s a system architect, having both designed and implemented crucial tools like a Stock Management System and a Printing Press Management System for the medicinal market – projects she continues to refine and maintain. 

Beyond her core Java expertise, Maryam possesses a solid foundation in C, C++, and database management with both MySQL and PostgreSQL. She’s also comfortable navigating the Linux operating system and possesses practical experience in functional and manual testing. A graduate with a B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering from RTMNU University, Maryam brings a blend of academic rigor and hands-on experience – 17 months specifically in J2EE – to every project. You can find her work and connect with her through her GitHub profile (github.com/maryam-khalil), LinkedIn (linkedin.com/in/maryam-khalil), or personal website (maryamkhalil.com), or reach her directly at maryam.khalil@email.com or +20 101 234 5678.
